PUPPET_FILE
  Puppet: FUNCTION_DEFINITION
    PsiElement(FUNCTION)('function')
    PsiWhiteSpace('\n')
    PsiPuppetFqnContainerImpl(FQN_CONTAINER)
      PsiElement(NAME)('type')
    PsiWhiteSpace('\n')
    PsiErrorElement:'(', '::' or '>>' expected, got 'attr'
      PsiElement(ATTR)('attr')
    PsiWhiteSpace('\n')
    PsiElement(PRIVATE)('private')
  PsiWhiteSpace('\n')
  PsiPuppetFunctionCallStatementImpl(FUNCTION_CALL_STATEMENT)
    PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
      PsiElement(NAME)('import')
    PsiWhiteSpace('\n')
    PsiPuppetExpressionRelationImpl(EXPRESSION_RELATION)
      Puppet: TYPE_DEFINITION
        PsiElement(APPLICATION)('application')
        PsiErrorElement:<fqn container> expected, got 'consumes'
          <empty list>
      PsiWhiteSpace('\n')
      PsiElement(CONSUMES)('consumes')
      PsiWhiteSpace('\n')
      PsiElement(PRODUCES)('produces')
  PsiWhiteSpace('\n')
  PsiErrorElement:Unknown tokens
    PsiElement(SITE)('site')
